name: IT / Tech Staffing

technicalSkills.description: Programming languages, frameworks, tools matching job requirements. Understand semantic equivalencies (React ≈ React.js, Python ML ≈ scikit-learn/PyTorch)

experienceDepth.description: Years of hands-on experience, project complexity, team size managed

cultureFit.description: Startup vs enterprise experience, remote work capability, communication style

locationFit.description: Remote eligibility, timezone alignment, willingness to relocate

availability.description: Notice period, contract end date, start date flexibility

notes: Technical skills matching must go beyond keyword matching. 'Managed 12 engineers' implies leadership even without 'management' on the resume. GitHub/Stack Overflow profiles are signal, not noise.
